text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
MedPAR Codebook │ April 2025 │ V 4.2 86 

EQTBL_BIC_CD 

LABEL: Equated BIC 

DESCRIPTION: The code which categorizes groups of BICs representing similar relationships between the beneficiary 
and the primary wage earner. 

The equitable BIC module electronically matches two records that contain different BICs where it is 
apparent that both are records for the same beneficiary. It validates the BIC and returns a base BIC 
under which
